arts.ttl: Jude Bellingham sends request to Real Madrid teammates during Girona clash
arts.sum: Real Madrid star Jude Bellingham was tonight heard sending a message of stern advice to his teammates. As much comes amid Real’s ongoing meeting with Girona. Los Blancos are currently…

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher claims Trent Alexander-Arnold can delay Real Madrid decision beyond 2025
arts.sum: Real Madrid are set to step up their transfer push for Trent Alexander-Arnold at the start of 2025. Alexander-Arnold is out of contract at Liverpool at the end of the 2024/25 season with talks on an extension ongoing. The England international effectively has two choices, sign a five-year renewal on Merseyside, or accept a fresh […] The post Jamie Carragher claims Trent Alexander-Arnold can delay Real Madrid decision beyond 2025 appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Official: Real Madrid name XI to face Girona, featuring 5 changes
arts.sum: The XI of players set to take to the pitch for Real Madrid in the club’s meeting with Girona has this evening been unveiled. Carlo Ancelotti’s troops are of course…

arts.ttl: CONFIRMED lineups: Girona vs Real Madrid, 2024 La Liga
arts.sum: Real Madrid have published their starting lineup for the upcoming match against Girona in La Liga. Barcelona just drew their match against Betis in Sevilla, so Real Madrid will play this game under the pressure of knowing that they need to come away with the three points in order to cut Barça’s lead in the table.

arts.ttl: Rodrygo Misses Real Madrid’s Girona Clash Due to Injury
arts.sum: Rodrygo Joins Growing Injury List as Real Madrid Call Up Youth Player Daniel Yáñez for Girona Clash In response to the multiple absences, 17-year-old Daniel Yáñez from the Juvenil A team has been called up to the first-team squad and is now travelling with the senior players ahead of the game.

arts.ttl: Real Betis 2-2 Barcelona: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Real Madrid receive major boost
arts.sum: Assane Diao scores a 94th-minute leveller as Real Betis hold Barcelona to a 2-2 draw in Saturday's La Liga clash in Seville.

arts.ttl: Starting Lineups: Real Madrid vs. Sevilla; Liga F
arts.sum: Real Madrid XI: Misa, Olga, Lakrar, Rocío, Shei, Leupolz, Toletti, Linda C., Eva Navarro, Redondo, Bruun Eva Navarro and Linda Caicedo are on wings, with Bruun and Redondo as the striker duo up front.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid trio to return to starting XI for Girona clash
arts.sum: Three members of Carlo Ancelotti’s Real Madrid squad are in line to return to the club’s starting line-up for their upcoming meeting with Girona. That’s according to Miguel Ángel Díaz…

arts.ttl: Sources: Manchester United trying to sign wonderkid wanted by Real Madrid, he's set to train at Carrington
arts.sum: Some of the world's biggest clubs are after him!
